name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: High-quality over-ear wireless headphones with noise cancellation and up to 30 hours of battery life.

name: Smart Fitness Tracker
description: Water-resistant fitness tracker with heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, and step counter.

description: 20000mAh fast-charging power bank with dual USB ports and LED battery indicator.
